LanguageData.Pneumothorax.label: pneumothorax
LanguageData.Pneumothorax.description: A collapsed lung caused by air accumulating in the chest cavity. As the condition worsens, breathing becomes increasingly difficult and the lung's efficiency decreases.
LanguageData.Pneumothorax.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.Pneumothorax.stages.1.label: minor
LanguageData.Pneumothorax.stages.2.label: moderate
LanguageData.Pneumothorax.stages.3.label: severe
LanguageData.Pneumothorax.stages.4.label: extreme
LanguageData.PneumothoraxNeedle.label: pneumothorax needle
LanguageData.PneumothoraxNeedle.description: A needle inserted to relieve pressure from a collapsed lung. Temporarily prevents the pneumothorax from worsening.
LanguageData.PneumothoraxNeedleProcedure.label: perform pneumothorax needle decompression
LanguageData.PneumothoraxNeedleProcedure.description: Perform needle decompression on a collapsed lung to relieve pressure. This temporarily stops the pneumothorax from worsening.
